title.zh: 高级电商与3D渲染设计师
title.en: Senior AIGC Visual Designer & Prompt Engineer

bio.zh: 拥有 7年以上专业视觉设计与三维创意经验。自 2022 年起全心投身 AIGC 领域，精通 Midjourney、Stable Diffusion (WebUI & ComfyUI) 深度工作流，将 AI 算法与传统 Cinema 4D、Photoshop 结合，实现了多款商业项目的效率千倍提升与先锋视觉落地。倡导“理性工程提示词，感性艺术触觉”的设计哲学。
bio.en: Over 7 years of professional visual design and 3D creative experience. Dedicated to the AIGC domain since 2022, mastering deep workflows of Midjourney, Stable Diffusion (WebUI & ComfyUI), and combining AI algorithms with traditional tools like Cinema 4D and Photoshop. This hybrid process has accelerated commercial pipelines by 100x while delivering avant-garde visuals. I advocate a philosophy of 'rational engineering prompt, emotional artistic touch'.

philosophy.zh: 设计并非关于工具，而是关于意图的精确传达。AI 并非取代设计师的灵魂，而是将设计师从体力的拘束中解放，使其在更广阔的心灵尺度上进行审美抉择。真正的留白与极简，是在嘈杂的技术浪潮中，保留最纯粹、最能击中人心的那一瞬光影。
philosophy.en: Design is not about the tool, but the precise delivery of intent. AI does not replace the designer's soul; it liberates the designer from physical repetition, allowing aesthetic choices on a grander intellectual scale. True negative space and minimalism mean preserving the absolute purest, most soul-stirring play of light and shadow amidst the noisy waves of technology.

title.zh: 至臻修护：高端水感隔离霜详情页
title.en: Pure Shield: Premium Hydrating Sunscreen Primer

description.zh: 专为高端美妆打造的隔离霜电商详情。柔和晨曦光影搭配温和植萃，传递纯净、自然与零负担的护肤修颜美学。

title.zh: 幻彩瞩目：极简雾面奢华口红详情页

description.en: A premium warm details layout for multifunctional heating table, highlighting cozy scene render and temperature controls.

title.zh: 智联未来：AIoT智能物联网云平台详情页

title.zh: 绿意谷雨：雪花啤酒创意自然节气插画
title.en: Guyu Splendor: SNOW Beer Creative Solar Term Illustration

description.zh: 充满生命力的自然美学，雪花啤酒经典瓶身立于山水飞瀑的漂浮微型岛屿之上，繁花环绕，右上角配有代表二十四节气的“谷雨”诗句，尽显传统时令的清爽与诗意。
description.en: An organic seasonal campaign illustration featuring a SNOW beer bottle standing on a floating miniature mountain with waterfalls, beautifully surrounded by lush foliage and Guyu solar term poetry.

works.prompt: A creative advertising illustration of SNOW beer bottle standing on a miniature floating island with high-detail traditional Chinese mountains, rivers, and waterfalls, surrounded by green plants and yellow flowers, with Guyu poetry on top-right.

title.zh: 国潮溯颜：山水仙鹤护肤精华插画
title.en: Chinoiserie Renewal: Ancient Landscape Skincare Essence

description.zh: 国潮风视觉美学，护肤精华液立于传统山水、仙鹤与粉荷背景中，巧妙结合DNA螺旋结构与“REVERSAL OF SKIN AGING”英文，展现传统神韵与现代抗衰科技的精妙交融。
description.en: Neo-Guochao style commercial design depicting a premium anti-aging essence bottle set against traditional mountain waves, flying cranes, and blooming lotuses, highlighting cellular rejuvenation.

works.prompt: A high-end Chinoiserie style illustration of an skincare essence bottle, with elegant traditional Chinese scroll mountains, cranes, pink lotus flowers, and a glowing DNA helix background, text 'REVERSAL OF SKIN AGING'.

title.zh: 快乐旅记：极简扁平风旅行户外插画
title.en: Wanderlust Diary: Minimalist Travel & Adventure Illustration

description.zh: 轻松欢快的扁平风卡通插画。身着户外装备、头戴草帽的旅行者立于向导路标旁，配以“快乐旅行记”与“来一场说走就走的旅行”文案，传递向往远方与探索世界的快乐氛围。
description.en: A vibrant and cheerful flat illustration featuring a backpacked explorer with a straw hat standing beside dynamic guideposts, celebrating the joy of traveling and spontaneous adventures.

works.prompt: A cute minimalist flat cartoon illustration of a backpacker in straw hat looking at signposts pointing to 'Fairyland Waterfall' and 'Thailand', with bold typography '快乐旅行记' and '来一场说走就走的旅行'.

title.zh: 鼠你最福：新春Q版国潮吉祥萌鼠
title.en: Blessed Hamster: Festive Q-Version Guochao Mascot

description.zh: 喜庆祥和的Q版国潮新年插画。憨态可掬的萌鼠身穿粉红唐装、双手作揖，身侧环绕“海吃不胖”与“有福”的卷轴祝福语，传递浓郁饱满的节日氛围与真挚的美好祝愿。
description.en: A heartwarming and festive Q-version Guochao mascot illustration of an adorable chubby zodiac mouse wearing a pink traditional Tang suit, holding a scroll wishing for abundant happiness.

works.prompt: A highly detailed Guochao style cartoon illustration of a cute chubby hamster in a red traditional Chinese Tang suit, holding scroll with Chinese characters, warm festive background with blue waves.

title.zh: 龙腾瑞气：传统国潮‘鱼跃龙门’插画
title.en: Dragon Mist: Chinoiserie Leap of the Golden Carp

description.zh: 传统国风祥瑞插画。威武的橙红色巨龙盘踞在古朴的传统牌坊之上，下方一尾红鲤鱼奋力跃出蔚蓝海面，配以祥云与层峦叠嶂，生动演绎‘鱼跃龙门’的励志与祥瑞意境。
description.en: A majestic traditional Guochao illustration of an orange-red Chinese dragon coiled around a classic gateway, with a red carp leaping high from the waves, symbolizing prosperity and success.

works.prompt: A high-end Chinese Guochao illustration of a magnificent orange-red dragon coiled on a traditional courtyard archway, with a red carp leaping out of waves below, stylized mountains and clouds background.

title.zh: 装点新家：现代家庭装修指南卡通插画
title.en: Cozy Spaces: Modern Home Renovation Guide Illustration

description.zh: 温馨可爱的家庭装修主题插画。描绘了一名手持油漆刷的装修师与一位欢呼期待的可爱女孩，背景中点缀着播放动画的电视机与居家好物，完美烘托“一起来装新家吧”的幸福感。
description.en: A warm and inviting home renovation-themed illustration featuring an artisan with painting tools and a cheering young girl, illustrating the cozy joy of crafting and decorating a dream home.

works.prompt: A lovely flat-style cartoon illustration about home decoration and renovation, featuring a painter holding paint tools, a cheering young girl, a cozy living room with a TV, and Chinese text '家庭装修指南' and '一起来装新家吧'.

title.zh: 5.17世界电信日：全新智能防诈骗指南

description.zh: 本海报采用充满科技感的3D立体等距插画风格，旨在宣传5.17世界电信日的防诈骗知识，通过生动的数字化场景，帮助用户轻松掌握反诈攻略，远离网络套路。
description.en: This poster utilizes a high-tech 3D isometric style to promote cybersecurity awareness for World Telecommunication Day, helping users stay safe from online scams with an easy-to-follow anti-fraud guide.

title.zh: 旧西圆学园：1+2新视觉创意培训与多元化教程

description.en: This poster uses a soft purple gradient background paired with rich 3D-style illustrations of books, a graduation cap, paint palettes, and stationery, creating an energetic and modern learning atmosphere for the 'New Vision' training courses.

title.zh: 数智未来：腾讯合作职业技能认证主视觉

description.en: Utilizing a futuristic 3D isometric illustration, this key visual seamlessly blends cloud, network, and data elements to illustrate how Tencent-partnered vocational certifications empower individual growth and career advancement in the digital era.

title.zh: 盛夏狂欢：2.5D极简科技风邀请有礼海报

description.en: The banner utilizes a crisp gradient blue backdrop paired with exquisite 2.5D miniature models of cash, gift boxes, and tablets, creating an engaging visually modern layout to highlight summer referral rewards.

title.zh: 新学期启航：开学季好礼派送活动

description.en: Featuring a heartwarming 3D cartoon style, this banner showcases a sunny classroom with a joyful schoolgirl. Bubbles of exciting school supplies float around, complemented by an organized navigation panel on the left, perfectly capturing the fun and anticipation of the new semester.

title.zh: 国庆狂欢：扭蛋抽奖线上活动主视觉设计

description.en: Featuring a warm and festive orange-red palette with adorable 3D cartoon illustrations, this design creates an engaging National Day lucky draw interface aimed at boosting user participation and interactive experience.

description.en: Clear water bottle paired with vibrant blue cap handles and snowman cartoon printings, highlighting comforting winter warmth.

description.en: Sleek industrial rendering of an elite robotic floor cleaner with premium matte finishes on polished hardwood flooring.

title.zh: 极境奢养：Perricone MD 沙龙级护肤套装

description.zh: 深色琥珀玻璃瓶身静立于海岸礁石之上，海浪轻拂，将临床医学科技感与大自然纯净修护力美妙结合。
description.en: Amber apothecary bottles set on shoreline rocks, presenting a perfect marriage of clinical science and clean nature.

title.zh: 蔚蓝海岸：海洋风创意护肤包装 Mockup
title.en: Azure Breeze: Tropical Oceanic Skincare Mockup

description.zh: 清爽怡人的热带棕榈与蔚蓝天空海景，衬托高透光感护肤品包装瓶身，展示盛夏海滨的度假清爽质感。
description.en: Refreshing tropical palms and azure ocean breeze framing highly transmissive cosmetic bottles, highlighting summer resort vibes.

title.zh: 轻盈流光：悬浮极简护肤包材 Mockup
title.en: Aetherial Float: Minimalist Floating Skincare Mockup

description.en: A minimalist set of white cosmetic containers floating in mid-air, emphasizing weightless purity and surreal product aesthetics.

title.zh: 巴渝风华：重庆传统糕点礼盒包装设计

title.zh: 净界之极：声波智能电动牙刷

title.zh: 微澜拂面：FORTUNEKO 智能超声波加湿器

description.en: A sleek, rounded white device gently diffusing therapeutic mist, creating an incredibly cozy, hydrated, and modern lifestyle aesthetic.

title.zh: 逆转时光：胶原提拉赋活精华液
title.en: Epitome Renewal: Collagen Lifting Face Serum

description.zh: 高级冰感磨砂玻璃材质，搭配悬浮的铂金微囊粒子。置于微距拉丝不锈钢底座上，展现高阶抗衰黑科技。
description.en: Premium cosmetic visualization of an anti-aging amber glass serum bottle on a sleek metal platform with active microscopic oil capsules.

title.zh: 焕白微光：酵母肌底修护精华露
title.en: Luminous Yeast: Active Cell Restoring Essence

description.zh: 透明莹润的水漾质地与彩虹极光瓶身，完美呈现透亮、盈润与深层舒缓的轻盈水光感体验。
description.en: A stunning 3D skincare visual of a holographic liquid essence bottle reflecting soft rainbow light and floating water ribbons.

title.zh: 柔如羽落：天然竹浆亲肤纸巾包装

description.zh: 极致素雅的乳白亲肤无纺包装，配合竹叶微风压纹。柔软纸巾自然抽出，传递绿色低碳、亲肤无敏的温柔呵护。

title.zh: 温和守护：儿童全效防敏消毒湿纸巾
title.en: Tender Care: Gentle Disinfectant Kids Wet Tissues

description.zh: 清爽淡蓝色亲肤外包装，专为婴幼儿娇嫩肌肤研制，传递无敏、温和、健康的日常安全清洁体验。
description.en: Soft pastel blue packaging with friendly details, representing a gentle, chemical-free sanitizing solution for baby's sensitive skin.

title.zh: 天禄九酝：至臻酱香白酒包装设计
title.en: Grand Heritage: Imperial Jiang-Scent Baijiu Design

description.zh: 深邃玄武岩磨砂壶身，点缀龙纹掐丝珐琅与亮金篆刻，置于幽静水墨山水背景中，沉淀大国匠心与岁月的醇厚芬芳。
description.en: Stunning majestic render of a premium dark basalt Chinese Baijiu flask decorated with cloisonné dragons and gold carving.

title.zh: 干燥秘境：极智静音双效除湿机
title.en: Aura Dry: Ultimate Smart Silent Dehumidifier

description.zh: 优雅流线型珍珠白烤漆外壳，环形多色氛围湿度指示灯。高品质3D建模展示无缝接缝与高雅家居氛围的和谐共融。
description.en: Elegantly constructed 3D visual of a high-tech smart dehumidifier, glowing humidity indicator ring in a moist studio environment.

title.zh: 微澜拂晓：植萃香体滚珠露
title.en: Dawn Mist: Botanical Roll-On Body Balm

description.zh: 磨砂渐变玻璃滚珠瓶，清晨露水般饱满凝结。展现自然草本控油爽身、舒缓止汗与微风般沁人香氛质感。
description.en: Aesthetic skincare render of a premium rolling ball body lotion, with glistening cool dew droplets on frosted gradient glass.

description.zh: 精通商业级产品高阶精修、光影重塑、拟真合成、大促海报多层创意排版，对电商视觉表现有极强的把控力。
description.en: Expert in high-end product retouching, lighting reconstruction, realistic composting, and multi-layered creative e-commerce typography.

description.zh: 熟练掌握 C4D 概念建模、产品打光、Redshift / Octane 写实材质渲染与物理动力学，呈现极致的商品质感。
description.en: Proficient in C4D concept modeling, lighting setups, Redshift/Octane photorealistic material rendering, and physics.

description.zh: 熟练运用 3ds Max 进行高精度硬表面建模、复杂家居场景搭建及物理材质灯光表现，呈现完美的空间张力。
description.en: Adept at 3ds Max hard-surface modeling, complex furniture scene layout, and physical rendering to show perfect spatial depth.

description.zh: 精通矢量品牌图形插画、企业 VI 视觉系统定制、高精度海报排版及包装刀版与印刷输出工艺流程。
description.en: Master of vector branding illustrations, corporate VI identity design, layout typography, and packaging prepress blueprints.

skills.name: 电商全案详情页深度定制

description.zh: 深谙各主流电商平台的高转化爆款设计逻辑，从卖点提炼、竞品分析到视觉风格定调、结构策划、渲染到精修一站式输出。
description.en: Adept at high-converting e-commerce design logics, offering one-stop solutions from USP selling points, copy outline, styling to rendering.

description.zh: 负责电商平台（APP/店铺）产品修图、详情页模板定制、活动促销首页制作、以及整体店铺风格打造、专业适配品牌企业 and 零售商需求
description.en: Responsible for product image retouching, custom detail page templates, promotional event homepages, and overall shop visual branding on e-commerce platforms (apps/stores), professionally tailored to the needs of brand enterprises and retailers.

zh: 独立负责电商平台整体视觉风格升级，深度定制适配品牌与零售商差异化诉求的详情页模板
主导核心爆款产品的高精度修图与促销物料视觉设计，显著提升高转化率主图的视觉质感
en: Independently led the visual style upgrade for e-commerce platforms, customizing detail page templates for diverse brand and retailer needs
Spearheaded high-precision product image retouching and campaign visual assets to boost click-through and conversion rates

description.zh: 负责活动促销首页及店铺(APP)等平台、提供产品修图，产品主题，详情页模板制定、banner 以及整体店铺风格打造
description.en: Responsible for promotional event homepages and shop designs for apps. Provided product retouching, product themes, detail page template formulation, banners, and overall store branding.

zh: 负责大促活动（双十一、年货节等）店铺首页及APP专题活动页的主视觉风格设计
定制多款高转化产品详情页模版及产品主题风格，打造兼具商业转化与艺术美感的品牌视觉
en: Designed main visual styles for mega-promotions (Double 11, CNY) across store homepages and app-specific campaign pages
Formulated high-converting detail page templates and distinct product theme lines, merging retail conversion with clean design aesthetics

description.zh: 负责大屏panel页,推荐图、icon进行改版、移动智家中心的魔百和线上及线下平台、宣传海报、H5、朋友圈作图
description.en: Responsible for redesigning big screen panel pages, recommendation graphics, and icons. Crafted promotional posters, H5 pages, and social media designs for Mobaihe online and offline platforms under the Mobile Smart Home Center.

zh: 主导IPTV大屏主页Panel及导航视觉系统升级，重构遥控器交互下的高清晰度图标与推荐图排版
独立承接线上专题H5推广页、宣传海报及朋友圈宣发物料设计，确保多端分发视觉的高度一致性
en: Led the overhaul of IPTV home page panels and icon systems, optimizing layout and clarity for remote-controlled interfaces
Independently created promotional H5 pages, print posters, and social graphics, maintaining a cohesive identity across diverse channels

description.zh: 负责店铺(淘宝、京东、拼多多)等平台提供产品修图、促销页面以及整体店铺风格打造、产品主题，banner，详情页模板制定
description.en: Responsible for product image retouching, promotional pages, overall store styling, product themes, banner designs, and detail page template formulation across platforms such as Taobao, JD.com, and Pinduoduo.

zh: 完成跨平台多店铺的整体视觉形象建立与日常店铺促销页面、KV主视觉的升级维护
制定统一的产品图修图规范与详情页组件化模板，大幅提升设计团队的日常上新输出效率
en: Established the overall visual brand identity and drove key visual upgrades for multi-platform e-commerce storefronts
Formulated unified retouching guidelines and modular detail templates, significantly boosting asset production efficiency
